sample_reviews.author: Mark T
sample_reviews.text: Brilliant service from OnePhase Plumbing. Called them out for a leaking pipe and they had it sorted within the hour. Very professional and reasonably priced.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah B
sample_reviews.text: Had a new bathroom fitted and I couldn't be happier with the results. Tidy, punctual and the workmanship is top quality. Would highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: James P
sample_reviews.text: Quick response to my boiler breakdown. The engineer was knowledgeable and got everything up and running the same day. Good value for money.

brand.usp: OnePhase Plumbing delivers fast, reliable plumbing and heating solutions across Birmingham with transparent pricing and no hidden extras. From emergency call-outs to full bathroom installations, we get the job done right first time.
brand.hero_headline: Birmingham's Trusted Plumbers, On Call For You
brand.about_paragraph: I'm the founder of OnePhase Plumbing, and I've been serving homeowners and businesses across Birmingham for years. We built this company on a simple promise: honest advice, quality workmanship, and fair prices every time. Whether it's a dripping tap or a full central heating installation, we treat every job with the same care and professionalism.
